REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Cult Fanatic awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Cult Fanatic.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Not in melee. Sacred Flame + approaching.

→ Triton — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:2+6=8 vs DC 11] FAIL! 3 radiant damage. HP: 49/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Triton — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
